title: Nee Uravaaga Lyrics Paambhu Sattai
stanzas:
puyal oyaama veesa
udal thaanaaga koosa
kaetten kadhal oasa

Oara kann paarva
yedhedho pesa
oodhaari payyan
naanum aanen nalla

nallum un vaasam
enmela veesa
aanene kora pullum
vaanavillaa

kannaal nee killa
kaayum ulla
ennaatha naan solla
oh oooo..

sollaama nee tholla
aala kolla
allaaduren pulla
oh ho....

kuppa kulam thunnaachu
kutti aalu theraachu
aathaadi unnaala
yedho aachu..

sorvum sellaama
thookkam illaama
yaen pulla enna neeyum
aatti vachcha

kaetkum munnaala
neeyum thannaala
onnaaga vazha podu
kadhal pichcha

ennodu nee vandhaa
podhum ponne.
illanu naan sonna
oh oh ....

sela kattum poongothu
unkooda ninnathaan gethu
venaame veredhum
sothu pathu.

puyal oyaama veesa
udal thaanaaga koosa
kaetten kadhal oasa
tamilStanzas:
ஏலே ஏலேலோ
நானும் மேலே
போறேன் காதலால்

நீ உறவாக ஆச
நான் வேறென்ன  பேச

புயல் ஓயாம வீச
உடல் தானாக கூச
கேட்டேன் காதல் ஓச

நீ உறவாக ஆச
நான் வேறென்ன  பேச

ஓர கண் பார்வை
ஏதேதோ பேச
ஊதாரி பய்யன்
நானும் ஆனேன் நல்லா

நாளும் உன் வாசம்
என்மேல வீச
ஆனேனே கோர  புல்லும்
வானவில்லா

கண்ணால் நீ கிள்ள
காயும் உள்ள
எண்ணாத நான் சொல்ல
ஓ ஹோ ...

சொல்லாம நீ தள்ள
ஆள  கொள்ள
அல்லாடுறேன் புள்ள
ஓ ஹோ ..

குப்பை குளம் தேனாச்சு
குட்டி ஆளு தேராச்சு
ஆத்தாடி உன்னால
ஏதோ ஆச்சு.

சோர்வும் செல்லாம
தூக்கம் இல்லாம
ஏன் புள்ள என்ன நீயும்
ஆட்டி வச்ச

கேட்கும்  முன்னால
நீயும் தன்னால
ஒன்னாக  வாழ போடு
காதல் பிச்சை

என்னோடு நீ வந்தா
போதும் பொன்னே
இல்லனு நான் சொன்னா
ஓ ஓ ..

சேலை கட்டும் பூங்கொத்து
உன்கூட நின்னாதான் கெத்து
வேணாமே வேறேதும்
சொத்துபத்து

நீ உறவாக ஆச
நான் வேறென்ன  பேச

புயல் ஓயாம வீச
உடல் தானாக கூச

seo.title: Nee Uravaaga Lyrics Paambhu Sattai
seo.description: Full Nee Uravaaga songs lyrics, Paambhu Sattai Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Yugabharathi, Music: Ajeesh, Singer(s): Haricharan, Shreya Goshal.
seo.keywords: Yugabharathi, Paambhu Sattai, Ajeesh, Haricharan, Shreya Goshal, Nee Uravaaga full lyrics, Paambhu Sattai songs lyrics, Nee Uravaaga lyrics snippets, Nee Uravaaga WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Nee Uravaaga lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Uravaaga'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing the desire for connection and intimacy.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Paambhu Sattai'?

This song plays a pivotal role in showcasing the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Nee Uravaaga'?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music composed by Ajeesh.

When was 'Nee Uravaaga' released?

The song was released on November 16, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Uravaaga, the romantic duet unfolds as the protagonists express their deep feelings for each other. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. It beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance, evoking emotions that resonate with anyone who has experienced love. As part of Paambhu Sattai, it enhances the film's narrative, drawing viewers into the characters' emotional journey.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Uravaaga from Paambhu Sattai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shreya Ghoshal, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. Experience the magic of romance as you dive into this captivating musical journey.
stanzaMeanings: I will go up, no matter what, because of love.
I wish to speak as you are my connection.
Without the storm, I will shout out my love like a breeze.
I wish to speak as you are my connection.
With one glance, you say something, and I am also a good boy.
Your presence brings good fortune to me; even a thorn cannot harm the sky.
With your eyes, you can cut through anything; what can I say?
Without saying, you take away; I am not a boy who will let go.
The small group has gathered; the little boy has understood something because of you.
Without any noise, there is no sleep; why have you made me a fool?
Before asking, you should let me live as you wish, love is a game.
Just your arrival is enough for me, if not, I will say something.
When flowers bloom, you are the one who gets the attention; I don't need anything else.
I wish to speak as you are my connection.
Without the storm, I will shout out my love like a breeze.
